          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "## Phase 9 — Exception scenarios (IDEA “Major Exceptions”)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "**Goal:** Teach edge cases as explicit workflows."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "**Incremental slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "| Feature | Priority |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "|---------|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "| Missing birth certificate → suspend | High |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "| Marriage not recognised | Medium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "| Duplicate identity investigation flag | High |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "| Illegal stay → reject + refer | Medium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "| Refugee / temporary protection path | Medium |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "| Diplomat separate rules | Low |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "| Homeless reference address | Low |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "| EU vs non-EU policy differences (deepen) | High |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "Each adds domain rules + UI branch + dedicated tests."

            "lineNumber": 419
          },

            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "## Phase 10 — PostgreSQL hardening \u0026 Aspire deployment"

          {
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "**Goal:** Production habits and deployable manifests."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "- [ ] PostgreSQL provider validated under Aspire (persistent volume, migrations on startup)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "- [ ] Expand Testcontainers PostgreSQL coverage (full integration suite against PG, not just migrations)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "- [ ] Snake case naming"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "- [ ] Structured logging via OpenTelemetry (ServiceDefaults)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "- [ ] Database health check (&#96;AddDbContextCheck&#96;) wired into the existing &#96;/health&#96; pipeline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "- [ ] Expose &#96;/health&#96; and &#96;/alive&#96; outside Development (ServiceDefaults maps them dev-only by default) with response caching and access restrictions"

            "text": "---"

          {
            "lineNumber": 8

          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Phase 0 establishes the full solution layout — Aspire orchestration, Blazor UI, domain/infrastructure split, vertical-slice scaffolding, and CI — without implementing any business workflow beyond listing an empty registration case table. Everything is wired so Phase 1 can add real intake slices without restructuring."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "---"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| .NET Aspire AppHost with PostgreSQL | Done | Persistent data volume; Web waits for database |"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "**Demo:** &#96;dotnet restore&#96; / &#96;dotnet build&#96; unchanged for developers; all package versions live in one manifest."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "**Tests:** Existing Phase 0 tests stay green (no behavior change)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "## Phase 1 — Case intake \u0026 identity (IDEA Phases 1–2, 12 partial) ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-1-case-intake-identity.md](./phases/phase-1-case-intake-identity.md) for full delivery notes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "**Goal:** Open a registration case and record identity."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- &#96;OpenRegistrationCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "- &#96;ListRegistrationCases&#96; / &#96;GetRegistrationCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordIdentity&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "- &#96;AttachDocument&#96; (metadata + local file upload)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; lifecycle: &#96;Intake&#96; status + completeness checklist (&#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; first)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "- &#96;Person&#96; aggregate basics"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "- &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "- Case list page"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "- New case dialog (visit reason, assign officer)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "- Case detail — identity step (MudForm)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "- Document upload component"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "**Demo:** Officer opens case, enters name/DOB/nationality, uploads passport scan."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "- Domain: invalid transitions throw; checklist flags computed correctly"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "- Integration: open case + record identity persists"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "- Validator: required fields"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "- Migrations: Testcontainers PostgreSQL applies all migrations (separate CI job, &#96;Category=PostgreSQL&#96; — starts here because this phase creates the first real migration)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "## Phase 2 — Residence category \u0026 permits (IDEA Phases 3–4, 11) ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-2-residence-category-permits.md](./phases/phase-2-residence-category-permits.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "**Goal:** Classify legal stay and attach permit evidence."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "- &#96;SetResidenceCategory&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordResidencePermit&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordImmigrationDecision&#96; (stub external decision)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "- &#96;ResidenceCategory&#96; enum + seed data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "- &#96;ResidencePermit&#96; entity on case"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "- Policy classes: &#96;EuCitizenPolicy&#96;, &#96;NonEuWorkerPolicy&#96;, &#96;StudentPolicy&#96; (minimal rules)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "- Residence step on case wizard"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "- Permit type picker with validity dates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "**Demo:** Non-EU worker case with B card reference; EU citizen with lighter requirements."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "- Policy rejects missing permit for non-EU"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 120
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 48
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "**Demo:** Full wait loop — request → police confirms with notes → case shows outcome on detail → second visit switches history to grid."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "- Cannot approve with negative police result (Phase 7)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "- Second visit (&#96;AttemptNumber&#96;) allowed when incomplete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "- &#96;GetRegistrationCase&#96; returns history with officer notes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "## Phase 6.1 — Collapsible intake sections ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-6.1-collapsible-intake-sections.md](./phases/phase-6.1-collapsible-intake-sections.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "**Goal:** Reduce scroll on the case detail page; collapse completed intake categories and auto-expand the next step."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "**Why now:** Phase 6 lengthened the case detail page further; officers need to reach the current task without scrolling past every completed section."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "- &#96;AppCollapsibleSection&#96; — design-system collapsible panel with header summary and status chip"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationIntakeStepSummaries&#96; — summary text, completion checks, default expansion"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "- Case detail accordion: Identity always expanded; legal residence → address → household → civil status → police verification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "- Police awaiting alert moved into police section body"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "**Demo:** Open new case → only Identity expanded → record identity → Legal residence auto-expands → completed steps collapse with summaries in headers."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "**Tests:** &#96;RegistrationIntakeStepSummariesTests&#96; (default expansion matrix)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "## Phase 7 — Decision \u0026 registration (IDEA Phases 18–20)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "**Goal:** Officer decision and official registration in correct register."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "- &#96;GetCaseReviewChecklist&#96; (computed readiness)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "- &#96;ApproveCase&#96; / &#96;RejectCase&#96; / &#96;SuspendCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "- &#96;ConfirmRegistration&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "- &#96;AssignNationalRegisterNumber&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "- &#96;RegisterTarget&#96; selection rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationConfirmed&#96; domain event"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "- Terminal states &#96;Registered&#96; and &#96;Rejected&#96;; &#96;Suspended&#96; as resumable pause"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "- Review dashboard with four core questions checklist"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 364
          },

            "line": 313
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "**Educational UI:** Police clerk portal at &#96;/registration/police-verifications&#96;; case detail &#96;PoliceVerificationSection&#96; shows pending visit and completed history (card for one visit, table for multiple) including clerk notes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "**Implemented (Phase 6):** see [phase-6-police-verification-loop.md](./phases/phase-6-police-verification-loop.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "### 7. Documents (evidence)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Store metadata and files for identity, residence, and address proof."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "**Aggregate:** &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "- Type (passport, rental contract, marriage certificate, …)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "- Storage path / hash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "- Validity, language, legalisation status (simplified flags)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "- Linked &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "**Not in early phases:** OCR, automatic classification."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "### 8. National Register (stub)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Search for existing persons; BIS → NR conversion simulation."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "**Implemented (Phase 5):** see [phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md](./phases/phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "**Operations:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "- &#96;SearchNationalRegister&#96; → scored matches (optional partial criteria: given name, family name, and/or birth date)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "- &#96;LinkExistingPerson&#96; → attach stub record to case as &#96;Person&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; → create new person when no link (duplicate warning on read)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "- &#96;ConvertBisNumber&#96; → stub NR assignment for BIS-only persons"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "- &#96;AssignNationalRegisterNumber&#96; → planned Phase 7 (official registration)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "**Educational stub:** PostgreSQL/SQLite table &#96;national_register_persons&#96; seeded at startup; &#96;NationalRegisterSearchScorer&#96; ranks candidates (scores 40–100)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "### 9. Certificates \u0026 notifications"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "**Purpose:** Documents issued to citizen; inform other administrations (stub)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "**Concepts:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "- &#96;CertificateRequest&#96; — residence certificate, household composition, proof of address"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "- &#96;OutboundNotification&#96; — tax, social security, health insurance (log only)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "**Triggered by:** &#96;RegistrationConfirmed&#96; domain event."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "## The four core decisions (implementation mapping)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "| Decision | Primary data | Checklist flag / gate |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "|----------|--------------|-----------------------|"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 237
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 180
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/DOMAIN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 1 — Case intake \u0026 identity"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "- **Status:** Complete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "- **Completed:** July 2026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "- **Goal:** Open a registration case and record identity with document upload."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Phase 1 delivers the first vertical slice through all layers: officers can open an intake case, record citizen identity, and attach supporting documents. The domain model introduces the completeness checklist (&#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; first), &#96;Person&#96; and &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96; aggregates, and guarded transitions via &#96;InvalidRegistrationTransitionException&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "## Deliverables checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "| Deliverable | Status | Notes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "|-------------|--------|-------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "| &#96;OpenRegistrationCase&#96; slice | Done | Handler, validator, endpoint, dialog |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| &#96;ListRegistrationCases&#96; / &#96;GetRegistrationCase&#96; | Done | List enhanced; detail DTO with checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; slice | Done | Creates &#96;Person&#96;, marks checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| &#96;AttachDocument&#96; slice | Done | Local file storage + metadata |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; checklist | Done | Owned type on case; &#96;IdentityEstablished&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "| &#96;Person&#96; aggregate | Done | Name, DOB, nationality |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| &#96;AdministrativeDocument&#96; | Done | Type, path, hash, officer |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "| Case list page | Done | New case button, identity column |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| Case detail page | Done | Checklist, identity form, documents |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "| Document upload component | Done | &#96;MudFileUpload&#96; + handler |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| FluentValidation | Done | Open case + record identity + attach |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| Domain tests | Done | 4 tests — transitions + checklist |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "| Integration tests | Done | Open + record identity + API |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| PostgreSQL migration job | Done | &#96;ci-postgres.yml&#96;, &#96;Category=PostgreSQL&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "| EF migration &#96;CaseIntakeAndIdentity&#96; | Done | Extends &#96;registration_cases&#96;; adds tables |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## Domain changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "### &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- &#96;Open(visitReason, assignedOfficer, openedAt)&#96; replaces bare &#96;Create()&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordIdentity(identity)&#96; creates a &#96;Person&#96;, links &#96;PersonId&#96;, sets &#96;Checklist.IdentityEstablished&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- &#96;EnsureCanAttachDocuments()&#96; guards document upload during &#96;Intake&#96; or &#96;UnderReview&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- Data recording does **not** advance status — case stays &#96;Intake&#96;."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-1-case-intake-identity.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.29294973611831665
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "- [ ] &#96;aspire publish&#96; manifest for Azure Container Apps or Docker"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "- [ ] OpenAPI document published"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "## Phase 11 — Extended municipality (optional)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "Ideas beyond first registration:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "- Change of address within municipality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "- Birth declaration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "- Passport / ID card request workflow (simplified)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "- Multi-language UI (FR / NL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "- Reporting dashboard (cases per month, average police wait time)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "- Read model: consolidated **Person file** view"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "## Slice checklist template"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "When implementing any slice, complete:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "[ ] Domain method(s) with tests"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "[ ] Handler + validator"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "[ ] Endpoint (if HTTP exposed)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "[ ] EF configuration + migration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "[ ] Blazor page or component"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "[ ] Integration test"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "[ ] Seed data if reference data needed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "[ ] Glossary update if new terms"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "[ ] Correction path (domain + handler + UI edit) if slice records intake data — see Phase 2.1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "## Suggested first sprint (after Phase 0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "1. Phase 0 foundation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "2. Phase 1 through &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; only"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "3. One end-to-end Blazor demo with two test cases"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "That gives a tangible vertical slice through all layers before expanding horizontally."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "## Related documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "- [phases/](./phases/) — detailed delivery notes per completed phase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "- [design-system/](./design-system/README.md) — Schaerbeek design system \u0026 UI kit specification (Phase 3)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "- [DOMAIN.md](./DOMAIN.md) — context and aggregate reference"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "- [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) — slice conventions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "- [TESTING.md](./TESTING.md) — test types per phase"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          },

          }
        },

      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "Architecture docs written before/during scaffold: [ARCHITECTURE](../ARCHITECTURE.md), [DOMAIN](../DOMAIN.md), [TECH-STACK](../TECH-STACK.md), [TESTING](../TESTING.md), [GLOSSARY](../GLOSSARY.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "ADRs accepted in Phase 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "| ADR | Decision |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "|-----|----------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "| [0001](../adr/0001-no-mediatr.md) | Direct handler calls; no MediatR |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "| [0002](../adr/0002-test-database-strategy.md) | SQLite fast suite; Testcontainers PG later |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "| [0003](../adr/0003-health-endpoints-via-servicedefaults.md) | Health via ServiceDefaults, not custom routes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "| [0004](../adr/0004-checklist-over-linear-state-machine.md) | Checklist + status machine (design for Phase 1+) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "Solution-wide MSBuild settings in &#96;Directory.Build.props&#96;: nullable enabled, warnings as errors."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "## Demo walkthrough"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "1. **Start the stack**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "   dotnet run --project src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "2. **Aspire dashboard** — confirm &#96;web&#96; and &#96;postgres&#96; resources are healthy."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "3. **Open the Web app** — link from the dashboard or the URL shown in the console."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "4. **Navigate** — Home → Registration cases (&#96;/registration/cases&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "5. **Observe** — empty list with info alert (“No registration cases yet…”)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "6. **Role switcher** — change between Reception, Population, and Police; officer name in the app bar updates."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "7. **API (optional)** — &#96;GET /api/registration/cases&#96; returns &#96;[]&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "8. **Health (Development)** — &#96;GET /health&#96; returns 200."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "## Verification commands"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "dotnet restore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "dotnet build --configuration Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "dotnet test --configuration Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "Expected: **2 tests passing** (1 domain, 1 integration)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "## Intentionally deferred to Phase 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "| Item | Phase |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "|------|-------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "| &#96;OpenRegistrationCase&#96; slice | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "| &#96;RecordIdentity&#96;, document upload | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "| Case detail page and intake wizard | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "| Domain transitions and completeness checklist | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "| FluentValidation on request DTOs | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "| Testcontainers PostgreSQL migration job in CI | 1 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "| Real seed data | 1+ |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 250
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 195
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.26608675718307495
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| [Phase delivery notes](./docs/phases/) | What was built in each completed phase (start with [Phase 0](./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md)) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| [Testing strategy](./docs/TESTING.md) | Unit, integration, and UI test approach |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "| [Continuous integration](./docs/CI.md) | GitHub Actions workflow for public repo |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "| [Decision records](./docs/adr/) | Architecture Decision Records for key choices |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "| [Glossary](./docs/GLOSSARY.md) | Belgian administrative terminology used in the codebase |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "| [Domain source](./IDEA.md) | Original process walkthrough (Population Department perspective) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "## Technology (summary)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- .NET 10, C#, Blazor Web App, MudBlazor"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "- **.NET Aspire** — local orchestration, dashboard, and service wiring (AppHost + ServiceDefaults)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "- Minimal API endpoints co-hosted with the Blazor app"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- Vertical Slice Architecture with lightweight DDD"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "- EF Core (SQLite for fast tests → PostgreSQL via Aspire in dev/prod-like runs)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- FluentValidation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- MediatR **only when** cross-cutting pipelines justify it (see [TECH-STACK.md](./docs/TECH-STACK.md))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "## Solution layout"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "SchaerbeekMunicipality/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "├── src/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost/        # .NET Aspire orchestrator (start here)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.ServiceDefaults/ # Shared observability, health, resilience"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/           # Aggregates, value objects, domain events"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/ # EF Core, file storage, external stubs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "│   └── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/            # Blazor UI + Minimal API + feature slices"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "├── tests/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests/       # Pure domain rules, no I/O"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "│   └── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/  # Handlers, API, EF, selective bUnit"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "└── docs/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    └── phases/                                  # Delivery notes per roadmap phase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "Feature code lives in **vertical slices** inside &#96;Web/Features/{Context}/{UseCase}/&#96;, not in horizontal “Services” or “Repositories” folders."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "## Getting started"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "dotnet restore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "dotnet build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "dotnet test"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 70
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 28
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2639341354370117
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "**Demo:** Open a case with a PDF scan → click to preview in the sidebar → expand fullscreen → download; case list shows &#96;2/3&#96; progress."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "**Tests:** Existing suite stays green (77 tests); no new automated tests in this phase."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "## Phase 5 — National Register search \u0026 BIS (IDEA Phases 13–14) ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md](./phases/phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "**Goal:** Duplicate detection and BIS handling."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "- &#96;SearchNationalRegister&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "- &#96;LinkExistingPerson&#96; / &#96;RecordIdentity&#96; (create new)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "- &#96;ConvertBisNumber&#96; (simplified)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "**Infrastructure:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "- &#96;national_register_persons&#96; seed table"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "- Search by name + birth date + fuzzy match"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "- **Partial search:** optional criteria (any of given name, family name, birth date)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "- Search dialog before creating person (multiple ranked results; link per row)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "- “Possible duplicate” warning banner on case"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "**Demo:** Search &#96;Marie&#96; → link BIS record; or record Amélie Bernard manually → duplicate warning. Convert BIS to stub NR."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "- Duplicate link prevents second NR assignment"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "- Search returns scored matches (including partial single-field queries)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "## Phase 6 — Police verification loop (IDEA Phases 15–17) ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-6-police-verification-loop.md](./phases/phase-6-police-verification-loop.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "**Goal:** Async residence check with separate police role."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "- &#96;RequestPoliceVerification&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "- &#96;ListPendingPoliceVerifications&#96; (police clerk)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordPoliceResult&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "- &#96;PoliceVerificationRequest&#96; aggregate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "- Case status &#96;AwaitingPoliceVerification&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "- Population officer: “Send to police” action on case detail"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "- &#96;PoliceVerificationSection&#96; — pending visit + completed history (card or table)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "- Police clerk portal: pending list, result form with optional notes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "- Nav badge with pending count (police clerk role)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "**Demo:** Full wait loop — request → police confirms with notes → case shows outcome on detail → second visit switches history to grid."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "- Cannot approve with negative police result (Phase 7)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 318
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 250
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ROADMAP.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2622356414794922
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "## What is not built yet"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "See [ROADMAP.md](./ROADMAP.md) for upcoming phases:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "- **Phase 7+** — Final decision, registration, certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "**Phase 6 (complete):** Police verification loop — send to police, clerk portal, outcome history on case detail — [phase-6-police-verification-loop.md](./phases/phase-6-police-verification-loop.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "**Phase 5 (complete):** National Register search, partial criteria, link existing person, BIS conversion, duplicate warnings — [phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md](./phases/phase-5-national-register-search-bis.md)."
          }
        ],
