    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "│   └── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/              # Blazor + Minimal API + feature slices"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "├── tests/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "│   ├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "│   └── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "└── docs/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    ├── phases/                                  # This folder"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    └── adr/                                     # Decisions taken during Phase 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "### Dependency graph"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "AppHost  →  Web"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "Web  →  ServiceDefaults, Domain, Infrastructure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "Infrastructure  →  Domain"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "Domain  →  (no dependencies)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "Tests  →  Domain / Web (not AppHost)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "## What was built, by layer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "### AppHost"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "&#96;AppHost.cs&#96; registers:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- A **PostgreSQL** container with a named data volume (&#96;postgres&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "- A database resource &#96;schaerbeek&#96; referenced by the Web project."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- Web project startup gated on PostgreSQL readiness (&#96;WaitFor&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "Local development starts with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "dotnet run --project src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "The Aspire dashboard shows Web and PostgreSQL health. Web receives the &#96;schaerbeek&#96; connection string via Aspire service discovery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "### ServiceDefaults"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "Shared Aspire template providing:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- OpenTelemetry logging, metrics, and tracing (OTLP export when configured)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "- Default health checks including a liveness &#96;\"self\"&#96; check."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "- HTTP client resilience and service discovery defaults."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "Web calls &#96;AddServiceDefaults()&#96; at startup and &#96;MapDefaultEndpoints()&#96; after routes are registered. Health endpoints are **Development-only** by default:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "| Endpoint | Purpose |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "|----------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "| &#96;/health&#96; | Readiness — all checks pass |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "| &#96;/alive&#96; | Liveness — &#96;\"self\"&#96; check only |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "No custom Minimal API health route was added — see [ADR-0003](../adr/0003-health-endpoints-via-servicedefaults.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "### Domain"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "Initial registration bounded-context stub:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "| Type | Location | Purpose |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "|------|----------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCase&#96; | &#96;Domain/Registration/&#96; | Factory &#96;Create()&#96; → new id, &#96;Intake&#96; status |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96; | same | Strongly typed &#96;record&#96; wrapping &#96;Guid&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseStatus&#96; | same | Enum; only &#96;Intake&#96; used so far |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 105
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 40
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2593950033187866
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 0.1 — Tooling hygiene"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "- **Status:** Complete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "- **Completed:** July 2026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "- **Goal:** Modernize solution and dependency management before Phase 1 adds packages and slices."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Phase 0.1 is a small infrastructure pass on top of [Phase 0](./phase-0-foundation.md). No business logic changed. The solution file was migrated to the new SLNX format, and all NuGet package versions were moved to a single central manifest so future bumps (EF Core, Aspire, test libraries, FluentValidation in Phase 1) happen in one place."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "## Deliverables checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "| Deliverable | Status | Notes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "|-------------|--------|-------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "| Migrate &#96;SchaerbeekMunicipality.sln&#96; → &#96;SchaerbeekMunicipality.slnx&#96; | Done | Generated via &#96;dotnet solution migrate&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "| Remove legacy &#96;.sln&#96; file | Done | SLNX is the source of truth |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "| Add &#96;Directory.Packages.props&#96; (Central Package Management) | Done | 24 packages; versions grouped by area |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| Strip inline &#96;Version=&#96; from all &#96;.csproj&#96; files | Done | Projects reference packages by name only |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "| Build + test verification | Done | Same 2 tests passing |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "## SLNX migration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "The classic solution file (&#96;Format Version 12.00&#96;, GUIDs, platform matrix) was replaced by a compact XML file:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "SchaerbeekMunicipality.slnx"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "Structure:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- &#96;/src/&#96; folder — AppHost, ServiceDefaults, Domain, Infrastructure, Web"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- &#96;/tests/&#96; folder — Domain.Tests, Integration.Tests"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "**Why:** SLNX is the direction for .NET 10+ tooling — easier to read, diff, and merge than the legacy &#96;.sln&#96; format. Project references and build behavior are unchanged."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "**Migration command** (for reference):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "dotnet solution migrate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "**IDE / CLI:** Open or build with &#96;SchaerbeekMunicipality.slnx&#96;. CI still works with bare &#96;dotnet restore/build/test&#96; (no solution path required), but you can pass the &#96;.slnx&#96; explicitly for clarity."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "## Central Package Management (CPM)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "All package versions now live in [&#96;Directory.Packages.props&#96;](../../Directory.Packages.props) at the repository root."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;xml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\u003cPropertyGroup\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "  \u003cManagePackageVersionsCentrally\u003etrue\u003c/ManagePackageVersionsCentrally\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 58
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-0.1-tooling-hygiene.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.25581610202789307
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "## Phase 4 — Address \u0026 household (IDEA Phases 5–8, 9–10) ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-4-address-household.md](./phases/phase-4-address-household.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "**Goal:** Declare domicile and household; civil status."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "**Note:** Ship each slice with a **correction path** in the same phase (record + edit UI). See [Phase 2.1](./phases/phase-2.1-intake-corrections.md) for the established pattern."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "- &#96;DeclareAddress&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordHousingSituation&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordHouseholdComposition&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "- &#96;RecordCivilStatus&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "**Domain:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "- &#96;BelgianAddress&#96; value object (validation)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "- &#96;Household&#96; aggregate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "- Seed Schaerbeek streets / postal codes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "- Address form with municipality autocomplete"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "- Household member list (add/remove)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "- Civil status with conditional marriage fields"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "**Demo:** Complete address + tenant + spouse + child link."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "**Tests:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "- Invalid postal code rejected"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "- Cannot declare address without identity recorded"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "## Phase 4.1 — Document preview \u0026 case UX ✅"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — see [phases/phase-4.1-document-preview-case-ux.md](./phases/phase-4.1-document-preview-case-ux.md)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "**Goal:** Preview and download attached documents inline; improve case list and detail layout for day-to-day intake work."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "**Why now:** Phase 4 lengthened the case detail page; officers need evidence visible while filling address and household steps. The case list still only showed identity progress."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "**Slices:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "- &#96;DownloadDocument&#96; (read stream from &#96;IDocumentStorage&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "**Infrastructure:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "- &#96;IDocumentStorage.OpenReadAsync&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "- &#96;GET /api/registration/cases/{id}/documents/{documentId}&#96; with range support for PDFs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationCaseDocumentPanel&#96; — sticky right column on case detail (upload, list, inline preview, fullscreen dialog, download)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationCaseChecklistProgress&#96; — &#96;n/3&#96; + icons on case list (identity, legal residence, address)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "- Case detail two-column layout (&#96;MaxWidth.False&#96;, intake left / documents right)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "**Demo:** Open a case with a PDF scan → click to preview in the sidebar → expand fullscreen → download; case list shows &#96;2/3&#96; progress."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "**Tests:** Existing suite stays green (77 tests); no new automated tests in this phase."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 254
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 192
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ROADMAP.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.25115761160850525
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 3 — Design system \u0026 UI kit"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Status:** Complete — July 2026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "**Goal:** Turn the visual identity and UX philosophy of [www.1030.be](https://www.1030.be/fr) — the official Schaerbeek municipal website — into an enterprise-grade, reusable MudBlazor design system, so all subsequent phases build screens from one branded UI kit instead of ad-hoc MudBlazor defaults."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "This is **not** a pixel-perfect clone of the public website. It is a reverse-engineering of its design decisions (color, type, spacing, motion, accessibility posture) re-expressed as MudBlazor configuration for an internal back-office application."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "The full specification lives in [&#96;docs/design-system/&#96;](../design-system/README.md). This document records the delivery plan and scope."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## Why this phase exists"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Phase 1 shipped functional pages with an inline two-color &#96;MudTheme&#96; in &#96;MainLayout.razor&#96;. Every new page currently re-decides paddings, elevations, and component parameters."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Phases 4+ add wizards, search dialogs, police portals, dashboards, and certificates — dozens of screens. Without a design system, drift is guaranteed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- The application represents a municipality that already has a strong public digital identity. Officers should recognize the same brand at their desks."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "## Research base"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "The design language was extracted from the live site (July 2026): home, news, procedures (démarches), opening hours/contact, search, 404, and the compiled stylesheet (&#96;main-*.css&#96;). Key observations are documented in [design-system/README.md](../design-system/README.md) — visual identity analysis and UX philosophy."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## Scope"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "### In scope"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "1. **&#96;DesignSystem/&#96; folder in the Web project** — theme, tokens, wrapper components, templates (see [folder structure](../design-system/07-architecture-and-guidelines.md))."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "2. **&#96;SchaerbeekTheme&#96;** — production &#96;MudTheme&#96;: light + dark palettes, Open Sans typography scale, layout properties, custom shadow scale. Replaces the inline theme in &#96;MainLayout.razor&#96;. Code: [04-mudtheme-and-css.md](../design-system/04-mudtheme-and-css.md) (verified to compile against MudBlazor 8.15)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. **Design tokens** — &#96;SchaerbeekColors&#96;, &#96;SchaerbeekTypography&#96;, &#96;SchaerbeekSpacing&#96;, &#96;SchaerbeekLayout&#96;, &#96;SchaerbeekElevation&#96;, &#96;SchaerbeekMotion&#96; static classes; single source of truth shared by theme and components."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 29
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-3-design-system.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2473541498184204
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "Expected: **77 tests passing** (unchanged — no new automated tests in this phase; download is covered manually)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "## Carries forward"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "- Phase 5+ case detail pages should keep the document panel pattern; new intake sections go in the left column."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "- A future &#96;AppDocumentPreview&#96; wrapper (design-system Wave 2) can subsume &#96;RegistrationCaseDocumentPanel&#96; internals without changing the layout contract."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "- Print support and the full two-pane viewer template remain planned for Phase 8 — see [06-page-templates.md](../design-system/06-page-templates.md#8-document-viewer-phase-8)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "## Related documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "- [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "- [phase-4-address-household.md](./phase-4-address-household.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "- [download-document.md](../features/registration/download-document.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "- [attach-document.md](../features/registration/attach-document.md)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "- [list-registration-cases.md](../features/registration/list-registration-cases.md)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 104
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 83
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-4.1-document-preview-case-ux.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24689319729804993
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "Feature code lives in **vertical slices** inside &#96;Web/Features/{Context}/{UseCase}/&#96;, not in horizontal “Services” or “Repositories” folders."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "## Getting started"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "dotnet restore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "dotnet build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "dotnet test"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "dotnet run --project src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost   # starts Web + PostgreSQL + Aspire dashboard"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "**Prerequisites:** .NET 10 SDK and Docker (for the PostgreSQL container started by AppHost)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "Integration tests run against &#96;Web&#96; directly (SQLite, no AppHost). Day-to-day development uses the AppHost."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "**Phase 0 demo:** Open the Aspire dashboard → confirm Web and PostgreSQL are healthy → browse to the Web app → empty registration case list → switch officer role in the app bar."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "See [Application overview](./docs/APP-OVERVIEW.md) for screenshots of the current UI (case list, intake wizard, residence \u0026 permits, address \u0026 household, civil status, documents)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "## Design principles"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "1. **Model the workflow, not the database** — tables follow the domain; the domain does not follow CRUD screens."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "2. **One use case, one slice** — endpoint, handler, validator, and tests colocated."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "3. **Explicit state transitions** — registration cases move through defined statuses; invalid transitions throw domain exceptions."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "4. **Audit everything that matters** — who changed what, when, and why (educational substitute for formal Belgian audit requirements)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "5. **Grow by bounded context** — add slices inside a context before adding new contexts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "## License"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "[MIT](./LICENSE). Educational project — not affiliated with the Commune de Schaerbeek or any Belgian government body."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 92
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 60
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24616706371307373
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Schaerbeek Municipality — Educational Population Register"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "An educational .NET project that simulates the **Population Department** of a Belgian municipality (Schaerbeek). The goal is to learn clean architecture, domain modeling, and full-stack development by gradually building a realistic administrative workflow — starting with foreign citizen first registration."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "This is **not** a production system. It simplifies Belgian law and inter-administration integrations while preserving the *shape* of real municipal work: identity verification, legal residence, address confirmation, register assignment, and audit trails."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Uncomment after publishing to GitHub (replace YOUR_GITHUB_USER):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "[![CI](https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USER/SchaerbeekMunicipality/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USER/SchaerbeekMunicipality/actions/workflows/ci.yml)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "--\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "## Core questions the system must answer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "Every first registration ultimately resolves four sequential decisions (see [IDEA.md](./IDEA.md)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "1. Can we establish the person's identity with sufficient certainty?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "2. Do they have a legal basis to reside in Belgium?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "3. Do they genuinely reside at the declared address within the municipality?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "4. In which register should they be entered, and what legal status should be recorded?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "## Documentation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "| Document | Purpose |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "|----------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "| [Application overview](./docs/APP-OVERVIEW.md) | Screenshots and current UI capabilities |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "| [Architecture](./docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) | Solution layout, vertical slices, DDD boundaries, API and UI conventions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "| [Domain model](./docs/DOMAIN.md) | Bounded contexts, aggregates, workflows, state machines |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "| [Technology stack](./docs/TECH-STACK.md) | Stack choices, libraries, and what we deliberately avoid |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "| [Roadmap](./docs/ROADMAP.md) | Phased delivery plan from MVP to advanced scenarios |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "| [Phase delivery notes](./docs/phases/) | What was built in each completed phase (start with [Phase 0](./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md)) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "| [Testing strategy](./docs/TESTING.md) | Unit, integration, and UI test approach |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 30
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24384230375289917
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseId&#96; | same | Strongly typed &#96;record&#96; wrapping &#96;Guid&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "| &#96;RegistrationCaseStatus&#96; | same | Enum; only &#96;Intake&#96; used so far |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "| &#96;IRegistrationCaseRepository&#96; | same | &#96;ListAsync&#96;, &#96;AddAsync&#96;, &#96;SaveChangesAsync&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "No lifecycle transitions, checklist flags, or domain events yet — those arrive in Phase 1+."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "### Infrastructure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "- **&#96;MunicipalDbContext&#96;** — single DbSet for &#96;RegistrationCase&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "- **&#96;RegistrationCaseConfiguration&#96;** — maps to &#96;registration_cases&#96; with snake_case columns under PostgreSQL."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "- **&#96;RegistrationCaseRepository&#96;** — implements the domain port."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "- **&#96;InitialCreate&#96; migration** — creates empty &#96;registration_cases&#96; table."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "- **&#96;DependencyInjection.AddInfrastructure&#96;** — provider selection by connection string:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "  - SQLite (&#96;Data Source=...&#96;) → &#96;EnsureCreatedAsync()&#96; (tests)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  - Npgsql → &#96;MigrateAsync()&#96; in Development (Aspire runs)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "Snake-case naming convention is applied for PostgreSQL via &#96;EFCore.NamingConventions&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "### Web"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "**Composition root** (&#96;Program.cs&#96;):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "1. ServiceDefaults + Infrastructure DI."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "2. Blazor Interactive Server + MudBlazor."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "3. Scoped &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; and &#96;ListRegistrationCasesHandler&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "4. Database initialization on startup."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "5. Razor components, registration API group, OpenAPI (Development), default health endpoints."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "**Auth (educational fake):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "| Type | Role |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "|------|------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "| &#96;ICurrentOfficer&#96; | Current officer id, display name, role, &#96;CanApproveRegistration&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "| &#96;CurrentOfficer&#96; | Fixed demo officer; &#96;SetRole&#96; updates name and permissions |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "| &#96;OfficerRole&#96; | &#96;ReceptionOfficer&#96;, &#96;PopulationOfficer&#96;, &#96;PoliceClerk&#96; |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "| &#96;RoleSwitcher&#96; | MudSelect in app bar to switch roles at runtime |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "**UI:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "- &#96;MainLayout&#96; — MudBlazor shell with drawer nav, officer name, role switcher, Schaerbeek branding (&#96;#1B4F72&#96; primary)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "- &#96;RegistrationCaseList.razor&#96; — &#96;/registration/cases&#96;; calls handler directly; shows empty-state message pointing to Phase 1."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "- Home page and standard error/not-found pages from the Blazor template."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 146
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 103
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.24122829735279083
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "Each resident already registered at the address may appear."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "The municipality determines household composition."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "# Phase 8 — Civil Status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "Questions:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "Single"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "Married"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "Separated"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "Divorced"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "Widowed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "Registered partnership (where applicable)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "If married abroad:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "The marriage may need recognition."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "Supporting documents:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "Marriage certificate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "Translation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "Legalisation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "Apostille"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "Depending on country."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "# Phase 9 — Birth Information"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "Birth certificate may be required."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "Information includes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "Parents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "Birth location"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "Original nationality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "Birth registration number (if available)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "# Phase 10 — Nationality Verification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "The municipality determines:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "Current nationality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "Previous nationality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "Dual nationality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "Proof:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "Passport"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "National identity card"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "Nationality certificate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "# Phase 11 — Immigration Decision"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "Sometimes the municipality merely records an Immigration Office decision."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "Example:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "Residence already approved."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "Municipality only performs registration."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "Other times:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "Municipality must wait for Immigration Office."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "# Phase 12 — File Creation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "At this stage an administrative file is created."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "It contains copies of:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "Identity documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "Residence documents"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "Certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "Declarations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "Photographs (where applicable)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "Supporting evidence"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "Notes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "History"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "# Phase 13 — National Register Search"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "Before creating a new identity:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "The employee searches whether the person already exists."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "Possible outcomes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "Already registered years ago."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "Duplicate identity."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "Previous Belgian residence."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "Returned resident."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "Former asylum seeker."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "Child previously registered."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "Avoiding duplicates is critical."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "# Phase 14 — BIS Number vs National Register Number"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "Some people already possess a BIS number."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "Examples:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "Worked in Belgium."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "Received social security."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "Studied."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "Paid taxes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "If appropriate, the BIS identity becomes a National Register identity."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "Otherwise a new record is created."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "# Phase 15 — Police Residence Verification"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "The municipality requests residence verification."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "Actor:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "Local police."
          }
        ],

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 430
          },

          }
        },

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Phase 8 is now fully understood.

There is a naming collision to clarify. IDEA Phase 8 is already completed as Civil Status. The ROADMAP Phase 8 is Certificates and outbound stubs. The user likely means the ROADMAP phase.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Here is an overview of **Phase 8** as defined in this project’s [ROADMAP](docs/ROADMAP.md).

## Status & position

| | |
|---|---|
| **Title** | Certificates & outbound stubs |
| **Status** | **Planned** — no `phase-8-*.md` delivery doc yet |
| **Prerequisite** | **Phase 7** (Decision & registration) — cases must reach a completed/registered state before certificates make sense |
| **Maps to IDEA.md** | Phases **21–23** (residence card production, informing other administrations, citizen documents) |

**Naming note:** In [IDEA.md](IDEA.md), “Phase 8” is **Civil Status**. That content was already delivered earlier in this codebase (`RecordCivilStatus`, `CivilStatusStep.razor`, etc.). When the team says **Phase 8** in roadmap terms, they mean **certificates and outbound notifications**, not civil status.

---

## Goal

Deliver **citizen-facing outputs** and **simulated administration notifications** after a registration is confirmed — the “what happens after registration is complete” slice of the Belgian population workflow.

---

## Vertical slices (planned)

| Slice | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `IssueResidenceCertificate` | Generate a residence certificate for a registered person |
| `IssueHouseholdComposition` | Generate a household composition document |
| `ListOutboundNotifications` | View the log of simulated outbound messages to other administrations |

These are described in [DOMAIN.md](docs/DOMAIN.md) under **§9. Certificates & notifications**, triggered by a `RegistrationConfirmed` domain event (from Phase 7).

---

## Domain concepts (not built yet)

- **`CertificateRequest`** — residence certificate, household composition, proof of address
- **`OutboundNotification`** — tax, social security, health insurance, etc. (log-only stubs, no real integrations)

---

## Infrastructure (planned)

- **PDF generation stub** — simple HTML → PDF, or a printable Razor page
- **Notification log table** — persisted record of what would have been sent to other public bodies

---

## UI (planned)

- **“Print certificate”** on completed cases
- **Admin view** of simulated outbound messages (fits the design-system “Administration & settings” template pattern in [06-page-templates.md](docs/design-system/06-page-templates.md))

Related UI work deferred to Phase 8 from earlier phases:

- **Full document viewer template** — print toolbar, dedicated `AppDocumentPreview` wrapper, left-list/right-preview layout (Phase 4.1 shipped a practical subset only)
- **Print CSS** — hide app chrome when printing certificates ([04-mudtheme-and-css.md](docs/design-system/04-mudtheme-and-css.md))
- **Comfortable density** for citizen-facing certificate screens ([07-architecture-and-guidelines.md](docs/design-system/07-architecture-and-guidelines.md))

---

## Demo scenario (from roadmap)

> Registration complete → officer prints a certificate PDF → notification log shows something like **“Notify tax administration.”**

That end-to-end flow depends on Phase 7’s `ConfirmRegistration` / `RegistrationConfirmed` event being in place first.

---

## What exists today vs. what Phase 8 adds

| Already in codebase | Phase 8 would add |
|---------------------|-------------------|
| Civil status intake (`RecordCivilStatus`) | Certificate issuance handlers |
| Document preview on case detail (Phase 4.1) | Full print-oriented document viewer |
| Police verification outbound *request* | Outbound *notification log* after registration |
| Registration case through police verification | Post-registration outputs and admin notifications |

---

## Summary

Phase 8 closes the registration story: once Phase 7 lets an officer approve and confirm registration, Phase 8 produces **printable citizen documents** and records **stub notifications** to other Belgian administrations — teaching the “after registration” part of the workflow without real external integrations.

If you want, I can also outline how Phase 8 would likely break into implementation tasks, or how it connects to Phase 7’s domain events.

---

_**User**_

ok let's implement phase 8 then 

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Ready to implement phase 8.

Phase 7 is the prerequisite. It adds RegisterTarget and rejection/suspension reasons to the domain. RegistrationCase gets decision fields and methods. RegisterDeterminable logic marks when registration is determinable. A RegistrationConfirmed event and AssignNationalRegisterNumber method are added. Infrastructure updates RegistrationCaseConfiguration.

Phase 7 infrastructure also includes a domain event dispatcher and a migration. Web slices cover review dashboards, approval, rejection, suspension, resumption, and confirmation. The UI adds a review section with action buttons. Phase 8 introduces CertificateType, CertificateRequest, OutboundNotification, and OutboundNotificationRecipient.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
A solid plan is ready for phase 8. This is a large implementation.

A `RegisterTargetResolver` will map residence categories to default register targets. EU citizens map to PopulationRegister. Non-EU workers map to ForeignersRegister. Students may use ForeignersRegister or WaitingRegister. `RegisterDeterminable` will be marked once residence category and legal residence are established.

Approve requires identity, legal residence, address confirmation, and a determinable register target. It sets status to Approved and stores the register target. ConfirmRegistration assigns an NR number and raises a RegistrationConfirmed event. Reject sets a rejected status with a reason. Suspend moves the record from intake or under review. Resume returns suspended records to under review.

Resume will return suspended records to UnderReview if police verification is complete, otherwise to Intake. Domain events will be collected by RegistrationCase and dispatched after persistence.

A simpler handler pattern replaces complex event sourcing. ConfirmRegistration will directly invoke `IRegistrationConfirmedHandler` to generate notifications. The implementation uses a lightweight `RegistrationConfirmed` event record, a handler interface, and an outbound notification service.

PDF generation will use a printable Razor page or HTML string instead of an external library. A new `ICertificateDocumentGenerator` interface will return HTML content for browser printing. A certificate domain is being introduced with a `CertificateType` enum covering residence certificates and household composition certificates.

The `CertificateRequest` entity now includes fields for registration case linkage, certificate type, issuance timestamp, issuing officer, and document reference. An `OutboundNotification` entity is also being defined in the Notifications domain.

OutboundNotification will carry a recipient, message, creation timestamp, and a stubbed status field. Notifications will be sent to tax administration, social security, and health insurance. On registration confirmation, three notifications will be generated for these three entities.

RegistrationCase will gain properties for RegisterTarget, rejection reason, suspension reason, registered timestamp, and closed timestamp. A GetReviewDashboard method will compute a four-question review response from case state. The RegisterTarget enum will be placed in Domain/ReferenceData or Domain/Registration. Person.AssignNationalRegisterNumber will mirror the existing NationalRegisterPerson pattern.

The `RegisterTarget` enum now includes `SpecialRegister` alongside the other three values. A static `RegisterTargetRules` class provides the `SuggestFor` method, mapping each residence category to its default register target.</details></think>

---

_**User**_

ok I've added the phase 7 - implement phase 8 now

Starting Phase 8 implementation.

Reviewing existing patterns for the certificate domain. Planning CertificateType, CertificateRequest, OutboundNotification, and recipient enums. Will add repository interfaces and download document patterns next.

Mapping out infrastructure and web slice details. EF configurations and repositories come first. A notification handler will fire when registrations are confirmed. An HTML-based PDF generator stub is planned. Web endpoints will handle issuing residence certificates, household composition certificates, and listing outbound notifications. UI work follows.

UI work includes a certificate section on the registered case detail page, an admin OutboundNotificationsPage, and a nav link in MainLayout. Tests will cover domain logic and an integration flow confirming registration triggers notifications and certificate issuance. The PDF stub will likely use a printable Razor page or HTML with print CSS.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Proceeding with systematic implementation of Phase 8.

Defining core domain entities for Phase 8. Starting with enums for certificate types and notification recipients, plus value objects and the main CertificateRequest entity.

CertificateRequest now includes fields for certificate type, issued person, timestamp, issuing officer, and reference number, plus a static Issue factory method. OutboundNotificationId and the OutboundNotification entity are also being defined.

OutboundNotification now includes recipient, message, and creation timestamp fields, plus a static Create factory method. Two repository interfaces are planned: ICertificateRequestRepository for certificate requests, and IOutboundNotificationRepository for outbound notifications. A RegistrationConfirmedNotificationHandler will generate three notifications for tax administration, social security, and health insurance.

The DI container currently only allows a single `IRegistrationConfirmedHandler` registration. This prevents adding the new notification handler alongside the existing logging handler. The registration pattern needs to change to support multiple handlers.

Both handlers can be registered as scoped services against the same interface. The dispatcher will resolve all instances via `GetServices<IRegistrationConfirmedHandler>()`. An `ICertificateRenderer` interface is being introduced for certificate PDF generation.

`ICertificateRenderer` defines two methods: `RenderResidenceCertificate` and `RenderHouseholdComposition`, each accepting a typed model and returning HTML.

`HtmlCertificateRenderer` in Infrastructure will generate HTML with municipal styling and print CSS.

`IssueResidenceCertificateHandler` requires a Registered case status. It loads the person, address, and NR number, creates a `CertificateRequest` record, and returns HTML content plus a reference number.

`IssueHouseholdCompositionHandler` follows the same pattern but includes household members.

`ListOutboundNotificationsHandler` is also being planned.

POST endpoints will issue residence and household composition certificates and return HTML. A GET endpoint will list outbound notifications. The certificate print page may use </details></think>
